posters.title: All Time High Tour
posters.alt: Concert poster for All Time High Tour with halftone band photo and torn-paper typography
posters.objective: Promote a local DIY punk show with a raw, high-energy visual identity that reads instantly in the underground scene.
posters.visualLogic: High-contrast halftone and cut-and-paste type evoke 90s zine culture and classic punk flyers.

posters.title: Dreaming
posters.alt: Poster with floating silhouette, fiery glow, and DREAMING display type on a grainy dark ground
posters.objective: Capture a surreal, subconscious mood using a gritty, lo-fi visual language.
posters.visualLogic: Silhouette and airbrushed glow sit on dense texture so depth and mystery stay legible at poster scale.

posters.title: Retro Gundam Screenprint
posters.alt: Vintage screenprint-style poster with RX-78 Gundam, orange and purple type, and red frame
posters.objective: Evoke nostalgia for classic mecha anime with a distressed, limited-palette graphic.
posters.visualLogic: Complementary orange and purple on a dark field, framed by a bold red edge for vintage print impact.

posters.title: I Won't Tell
posters.alt: Halftone classical bust with cyan bar across the eyes reading I WON'T TELL IF YOU DON'T TELL
posters.objective: Bridge classical sculpture and digital print with a provocative take on secrecy and identity.
posters.visualLogic: Halftone pattern and a censorship strip focus attention on what is withheld, not shown.

posters.title: Showdown Nights After Hours
posters.alt: Event poster with night sky, speaker portrait, and silver and gold typography
posters.objective: Promote a late-night community program that balances energy, clarity, and spiritual tone.
posters.visualLogic: Celestial backdrop with metallic type keeps hierarchy readable over a busy photographic scene.

posters.title: Quran Night: The Serenity of Remembrance
posters.alt: Formal event poster with script title, speaker portraits, and soft Quran photography
posters.objective: Design a dignified invite for a university spiritual event that welcomes students and guests.
posters.visualLogic: Warm dark palette, script headline, and serif detail signal tradition and calm in one glance.

posters.title: Future Folklore Festival
posters.alt: Speculative festival poster with neon gradients, scanline texture, and Marrakech sector details
posters.objective: Promote a fictional festival that blends North African heritage with a far-future, cyberpunk lens.
posters.visualLogic: Neon gradients and scanline texture sell retro-futurism without losing cultural silhouette.
